name: Curved Surface Toolpath Projection
description: A manufacturing engineer must program a 6-DOF robotic arm to scan a curved radome represented by a sphere primitive (radius 0.25 m) at world coordinates (0.5, 0.0, 0.1) in CoppeliaSim (ZMQ API port 23000). Generate and visualize a 100-point toolpath based on a 10x10 grid in the XY plane (X from 0.35 to 0.65, Y from -0.15 to 0.15) over the top of the sphere. Each waypoint must maintain a 50 mm standoff from the surface with the tool's +Z axis pointing directly at the sphere center. Visualize the poses in the scene using dummy objects. Export the toolpath to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath.csv (columns: waypoint_id, surface_x, surface_y, surface_z, tool_x, tool_y, tool_z, tool_qx, tool_qy, tool_qz, tool_qw) and a report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/toolpath_report.json (fields: total_waypoints, sphere_center_x, sphere_center_y, sphere_center_z, sphere_radius_m, standoff_distance_m). Login: ga / password123.
